message:
feat(ffs-mvcc): SSI spec update + clippy fixes for lab test lock scopes (bd-1wx)

Update COMPREHENSIVE_SPEC_FOR_FRANKENFS_V1.md §5.0 to reflect Phase B
implementation: SSI commit_ssi, read-set tracking, active snapshot
registry, watermark API, and SSI log. Fix clippy significant_drop_in_scrutinee
warnings in lab_ssi_rejects_write_skew test.
